shayari:
Na puch mujhse mere jagne ki wajah aye chand...
Koi tera hi hamshakal hai jo aksar mujhe sone nahi deta...!!

Hum yaad rahe to theek, warna bhula dena...
Kuch galti ho jaaye toh khushi se saza dena...
Hum to ek kore kagaz ki tarah hain,
Kuch likh do to theek, warna jalaa dena.

Chiraagon mein itna noor na hota,
To tanha dil majboor na hota...
Hum aapse milne zarur aate,
Agar aapka ghar itna door na hota...

Karoge yaad guzre zamaane ko,
Tarsoge humare saath ek pal bitane ko.
Phir aawaz doge humein vaapas bulane ko,
Aur hum kahenge, darwaza nahi hai qabar se bahaar aane ko.

Nind nahi aati mujhe raaton me,
Zikr hota hai tumhara meri har baaton me.
Tumhe gair se baat karta dekh,
Mai ye sochta hu,
Konsi lakeer nahi hai mere hathon me...!!

Dhoop nikle aur barsaat na rahe,
Shayad kal ko mere aise haalaat na rahe.
Aur abhi sasta hoon toh khareed lo mujhko,
Kya pata kal tumhari aukaat na rahe.

Keemat paani ki nahi pyaas ki hoti hai,
Kadar maut ki nahi saans ki hoti hai.
Pyaar toh bahut log karte hain is duniya mein,
Par keemat pyaar ki nahi vishwas ki hoti hai.

Bahut gehri thi raat lekin hum soye nahi,
Dard bhi bahut tha dil mai,
Magar hum roye nahi.
Koi nahi hamara jo puche humse bhi,
Jaag rahe ho kis ke liye,
Aur kis ke liye soye nahi.

Mere dil par zakhm uske ishq ki meharbani hai,
Meri mohabbat ek adhoori kahani hai.
Sochte hain khatm kar de is dard ko,
Magar ye dard hi toh uski aakhiri nishani hai.

Wo ishq hi kya jo kisi ke chehre se ho...
Maza toh tab aata hai jab ishq kisi ki baaton se ho...!!

Shaadi bhi kar liye aur sukoon bhi chahte ho...
Bade nadaan ho Ghalib,
Zehar bhi pee liye aur jeena bhi chahte ho...!!

Mat kar waada aakhri pal tak saath chalne ka.
Hamari riti-riwajo me aurten qabristan tak nahi jaya karti.

Ki kismat ke khel se kabhi mayus nahi hote,
Mere dost zindagi me aise kabhi udaas nahi hote.
Aur haathon ki lakeeron par kabhi bharosa mat karna,
Takdeer to unki bhi hoti hai jinke haath nahi hote.

Padhne wala bhi tera deedar karega,
Ek baar nahi sau baar padhega.
Main likhunga jab shayari tujhpe,
Meri diary ka ek ek panna bhi tujhse pyaar karega.

Kuch sahi toh kuch kharab kehte hai,
Log hume bigda hua nawab kehte hai.
Hum toh badnaam hue kuch is kadar,
Pani bhi piya toh log sharab kehte hai.

Zindagi se thodi wafa kijiye,
Jo nahi mila use dafa kijiye.
Har koi nahi hota aapke qabil,
Akele baith ke chai ka maza lijiye.

Kalam thodi kamzor hai hamari,
Taarifein tumhari ek saath nahi likh paayegi.
Apni aankhon se kaho zara kam itraaye,
Inhe pata hai shuruaat inhi se ki jayegi.

Ae hawa tu bhi toh wahan jaati hogi,
Mera haal unko batati hogi.
Zara chhoo kar dekh unke dil ko,
Kya unko bhi meri yaad aati hogi.

Gulab jaise ho,
Gulab lagte ho.
Halka sa muskura do toh,
Lajawab lagte ho.

Main tod leta agar tu gulaab hoti,
Main jawab banta agar tu sawaal hoti.
Sab jaante hain main nasha nahi karta,
Magar main pee bhi leta agar tu sharaab hoti.

Teri aankhon ke saamne ye shehar kaun dekhega,
Tu dariya si hai ye lehar kaun dekhega.
Tu khubsurat se bhi zyada khubsurat hai,
Tujhe dekhne ke baad Taj Mahal kaun dekhega.

Mohabbat na hoti toh ghazal kaun likhta,
Keechad ke phool ko kamal kaun kehta.
Pyaar toh kudrat ka karishma hai,
Warna laash ke ghar ko Taj Mahal kaun kehta.

Chup rahoge toh baat kaun karega,
Hum nahi rahe toh yaad kaun karega.
Mana ki hum itne ache nahi hai,
Par hum na rahe toh pareshan kaun karega.

Teri aankhon par main likh nahi sakta,
Tere aage tik nahi sakta.
Tu chahe toh muft mein khareed le mujhe,
Koi aur chahe toh main bik nahi sakta.

Dekh kar muskurati hai,
Baatein nahi karti.
Uff tujhse bhi zyada nakhre hain,
Teri tasveer ke.

Tumhen bhool jaaun,
Itna kamzor mera pyaar nahi.
Aur kisi aur se mohabbat kar loon,
Itna gira hua mera kirdaar nahi.

You say you love rain but you open your umbrella.
You say you love the sun but you find a shadow spot.
You say you love wind but you close your windows.
This is why I am afraid when you say you love me.

Ek tarfa ishq ki ye seekh hai,
Unka dikh jana bhi ek bheekh hai.
Maine jab bhi ki unse izhaar-e-mohabbat,
Woh kehte hain hum dost hi theek hain.

Haqiqat kahu toh tujhe khwab lagta hai,
Shikayat karu toh tujhe mazak lagta hai.
Kitni shiddat se yaad karta hu main tujhe,
Lekin tujhe ye sab ittefaq lagta hai.

Impression se lekar,
Depression tak.
Relationship se lekar,
Akelepan tak.
Chatting se lekar,
Blocked list tak.
Sukoon se lekar,
Dard tak.
Aur phir samajh aayi ek baat...
Na zikar kar, na fikar kar.
Bas apne jazbaaton ki kadar kar.
Jo tera hoga, woh tujhe dhoond hi lega.
Bas tu apni baari ka sabr kar.

Roz roz baat ho,
Aur lagav na ho.
Matlab khanjar chale,
Aur ghaav na ho.

Woh kya royegi mere dard pe,
Jiska dil fida ho,
Duniya ke har mard pe.

Janaza dekh kar mera pareshan na hona,
Roz marta tha,
Bas qabar aaj khodi gayi hai.

Silsila hi na hota,
Koi gila hi na hota.
Ya toh mil gaya hota,
Ya phir mila hi na hota.

Toota hua aaina kisi ne joda hai kya?
Mohabbat ne aaj tak kisi ko chhoda hai kya?
Yeh jo tum hans rahe ho meri shayari par,
Kisi ne tumhara bhi dil toda hai kya?

Ulfat,
Mohabbat,
Bewafa,
Haya,
Ishq,
Gum,
Afsaane.
Woh shakhs aaya hi tha zindagi mein,
Shayad Urdu sikhane.

Kehte hain qabar mein sukoon ki neend aati hai.
Ajeeb baat hai,
Yeh baat bhi zinda logon ne hi kahi hai.

Teri shaadi ki khabar sunkar mohtarma,
Mere ghar walon ne,
Ghar ke sabhi pankhe utaar phekhe.

Isharon ko samajh jao tum,
Mujhe jatana nahi aata.
Pyaar toh bahut hai tumse,
Magar mujhe batana nahi aata.

Koi zakhm nahi hai,
Lekin phir bhi dard ka ehsaas hai.
Lagta hai dil ka ek tukda,
Aaj bhi uske paas hai.

Palat kar jab bhi dekhogi,
Tum humari taraf.
Hum hamesha tumko,
Tumhari taraf hi dekhte milenge.

Tere chehre par kisi aur ki nazar,
Mujhe manzoor nahi.
Teri baaton mein kisi aur ka zikr,
Mujhe manzoor nahi.
Tu meri hai aur bas meri hi rahe,
Tere saath kisi aur ka saya bhi,
Mujhe manzoor nahi.

Wajah poochne ka mauqa hi na mila Ghalib,
Woh lehja badalte rahe,
Hum ajnabi hote gaye.

Tumhara chehra chaand sa hai,
Aur aankhen jaise koi noor.
Tumhari tareef hum kya hi kare,
Tumhare aage toh fika hai Kohinoor.

Tum woh chaand ho,
Jispe koi daag nahi.
Tum itni khubsurat ho,
Jiska koi hisaab nahi.

Main chahu toh dekh loon,
Tere alawa bhi koi.
Lekin ye aankhen wafadar hain,
Daga nahi karti.

Phool kabhi dubara nahi khilta,
Janam kabhi dubara nahi milta.
Yun toh mil jaate hain hazaron,
Par jise dil se chaaho,
Woh dubara nahi milta.

Khud ko teri yaadon ka gulam kar diya,
Tere khatir khud ko badnaam kar diya.
Aur kya saboot du apni mohabbat ka,
Mere paas ek hi dil tha,
Woh bhi tere naam kar diya.

Socha tha iss kadar unko bhool jayenge.
Dekh kar bhi andekha kar jayenge.
Par jab jab saamne aaya unka chehra,
Toh socha ek baar aur dekh le,
Agli baar bhool jayenge.

Har koi mera ho jaaye,
Aisi meri taqdeer nahi.
Main woh sheesha hoon,
Jiski koi tasveer nahi.
Dard se rishta hai mera,
Khushiyan mujhe naseeb nahi.
Mujhe bhi koi yaad kare,
Main itna bhi khushnaseeb nahi.

Umar bhar Ghalib yahi bhool karta raha,
Dhool chehre par thi,
Aur aaina saaf karta raha.

Chai khatam hone tak,
Tum rukne ka waada toh karo.
Hum aakhri ghoont bhi,
Aakhri saans tak piyenge.

Mard ne hamesha aurat ke liye khudko badla hai,
Magar afsos,
Aurat ne hamesha mard hi badla hai.

Khwabon ki duniya mein hum khote gaye,
Hosh mein the phir bhi madhosh hote gaye.
Jaane kya jaadu tha us ajnabi chehre mein,
Khud ko roka bahot,
Phir bhi uske hote gaye.

Kash tum meri yaad mein kuch aise ulajh jao,
Yahan main tumhare baare mein sochu,
Aur wahan tum samajh jao.

Khamoshi se matlab nahi,
Matlab toh baaton ka hai...
Din toh guzar hi jaata hai,
Masla toh raaton ka hai...

Ehsaas kara deti hai rooh,
Jinki baatein nahi hoti.
Ishq woh bhi karte hain,
Jinki mulaqatein nahi hoti.

Mana ki kaafi door hoon,
Lekin dil ke sabse paas ho tum...
Subah ki pehli,
Aur raat ki aakhri yaad ho tum....

Socha tumhare liye tadapna chhod denge,
Socha tumhare liye tarasna chhod denge.
Dil se kaha ae dil,
Bhool ja usse.
Dil ne kaha,
Dobara kaha toh dhadakna chhod denge.

Bahot khaas ho tum aaj bhi,
Bas jatana chhod diya....
Yaad tumhari har roz aati hai,
Bas maine batana chhod diya.

Ek uljha hua kirdaar hoon main,
Log sochte hain ki samajhdar hoon main.
Khud ki talaash mein khoya hua hoon,
Yeh kaisa talabgar hoon main.

Har dil ka ek raaz hota hai,
Har baat ka alag andaaz hota hai.
Jab tak na mile bewafai ki thokar,
Har kisi ko apni pasand par naaz hota hai.

Chhoti chhoti baaton par,
Naraaz mat hua kar.
Galti ho jaane par,
Maaf kar diya kar.
Naraaz tab hona,
Jab hum rishta tod de.
Aur aisa tab hoga,
Jab hum duniya chhod de.

Tum door ho toh koi gham nahi.
Teri yaad kisi mulaqat se kam nahi.
Yun toh bhool jaate hain log aksar humein.
Par tujhko bhool jaaye,
Itne bure hum nahi.

Tujhe yaad na karu toh bechaini si hoti hai.
Pata nahi ye zindagi saanson se chal rahi hai,
Ya teri yaadon se.

Woh saamne tha aur hum palake utha na sake.
Chahte the par paas uske ja na sake.
Na dekh le woh apni tasveer humari aankhon mein,
Bas yahi soch kar hum unse nazrein mila na sake.

Bhool gaye ya bhoolna chahte ho,
Door ho gaye ya hona chahte ho.
Aaj kal message nahi kar rahe,
Haath toot gaye ya tudwana chahte ho.

Ishq ne insaan ko kya bana diya,
Kisi ko shayar toh kisi ko qatil bana diya.
Do phoolon ki bojh na utha saki thi Mumtaz,
Aur Shah Jahan uski yaad mein Taj Mahal bana diya.

Waqt beet jaye toh,
Log bhula dete hai.
Bewajah log apne ko bhi,
Rula dete hai.
Jo diya raat bhar,
Roshni deta hai.
Subah hote hi log use,
Bujha dete hai.

Chaand kahu toh sharma jaogi,
Phool kahu toh mehak jaogi.
Khwab kahu toh aankhon mein bas jaogi,
Dua kahu toh dil se nikal jaogi.
Chalo tumhara naam sukoon rakh du,
Jab bhi yaad aaogi,
Muskuraahat de jaogi.

Dil mein base ho,
Zara khyaal rakhna.
Waqt mile toh,
Hume yaad karna.
Hume toh aadat hai,
Aap ko yaad karne ki.
Aapko bura lage,
Toh hume maaf karna.

Ishq ke hame benaam kar diya,
Har khushi se hame anjaan kar diya.
Hamne toh kabhi nahi chaha ki,
Hame mohabbat ho.
Lekin aapki ek nazar ne,
Hame nilaam kar diya.

Din hua toh raat bhi hogi,
Ho mat udaas kabhi baat bhi hogi.
Itni pyaari si dosti ki hai,
Zindagi rahi toh mulaqat bhi hogi.

Kitna pyaar hai tumse ye jaan lo,
Tum hi zindagi ho iss baat ko maan lo.
Tumhe dene ke liye kuch bhi nahi hai mere paas,
Bas ek jaan hai,
Jab jee chahe maang lo.

Tere dil mein mujhe aisi,
Umar-qaid mile.
Thak jaaye saare wakil,
Mujhe zamaanat na mile.

Jaruri nahi ke jeene ka koi sahara ho,
Jaruri nahi jiske hum ho,
Woh bhi hamara ho.
Kuch kashtiyan doob jaya karti hain,
Jaruri nahi har kashti ke naseeb mein kinara ho.

Meri is deewangi mein,
Kuch kasoor tumhara bhi hai.
Tum itne pyaare na hote toh,
Hum itne deewane na hote.

Maine kab kaha mujhe gulaab de,
Ya pyaar se nawaaz de.
Aaj dil bahut udaas hai mera,
Gair banke hi sahi,
Par aawaaz de.

Bahane bahane se hum teri baat karte hain,
Har pal khayalon mein hum aapse mulaqaat karte hain.
Itni dafa toh aap saans bhi nahi lete,
Jitni baar hum aapko yaad karte hain.

Bahut udaas hai koi tere chup ho jaane se.
Ho sake toh baat kar le,
Mujhse koi bahaane se.
Tu laakh khafa hi sahi,
Magar itna toh dekh,
Koi toot raha hai,
Tere rooth jaane se.

Kuch toh chaahat hogi,
In baarishon ke boondon ki.
Warna kaun girta hai,
Is zameen par,
Aasmaan tak pahunchne ke baad.
